title: taraxacum leoninum
intro: Taraxacum leoninum, also known as lion's dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing liver and kidney toxicity, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum leoninum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote natural healing.
